programs.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programs.desc: The air ambulance teams help Dennis, who's having a heart attack. A spin on her bike has catastrophic consequences for Carolyn. And there's a dramatic car crash in Norfolk.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Doctors suspect that 31-year-old Aaron has sustained a brain injury in a high-speed car crash. His twin brother Alvin talks about his hopes for Aaron's future.

programs.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programs.desc: Niki is airlifted to St George's after crashing in a charity bike ride. His wife is almost 300 miles away. Peter, who's 90 and served in the RAF in WWII, has blood poisoning.

programs.title: Food Unwrapped
programs.desc: In Israel, Kate unearths icing sugar's secret ingredient. Jimmy grapples with a team of wrestlers who swear by a mysterious yoghurt called skyr. And Matt deep-dives for edible seaweed.

programs.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programs.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.
